ddt:Target.Name: EMS3250_C012_0700_C1A_29b_v1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Applications: XHN Engines: ECU: EMS3250 Soft: C012 XXX ____________ [22-07-2021] EMS3250_C012_0700_C1A_29b_v1.0 (SMA)
Added Auto ident $63/C012_400/c012_500/c012_550/C012_700 Adde Vehicle XHN -Added DIDs (DCM_DID_List_xxxx(7-0)->DID_List_C012_700(5-0)-Updated 174 DIDs -Added DTC s [EventList_C012_700(5-2)] -Added I/O Controls for $017E;$0186;$0187;$1010;$1011;$101C;$101F;$1021;$1062;$107F;$1093;$1098;$109F;$10D3;$2004;$201A;$201B;$202C;$202F;$2036;->Updated Buttons -Routine Identifiers Updated/Routine control Coded ->RID_List_C012_700(5-1) >2001,2002,2003,2004,3001,3003,3005,3006,3007,C207,CEE1,CEE5,CEE6,CEE7,CEE9,CEEA,CEEB; -Common screens updated with reference to C012_550

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Label.Text: AUTO Start/Stop I/O Control By DID ($2F)
I/O Control $017E - Motor driven fan PWM set point
I/O Control $0186 - Air flap Setpoint LIN RAW
I/O Control $0187 - GRILLE SHUTTER calibration command LIN 0: not Calibration
I/O Control $1010 - Oil pressure pump proportional final command
I/O Control $1011 - Dissociation valve opening command
I/O Control $101C - LP TCR position setpoint after software limit stops
I/O Control $101F - LP EGR valve position setpoint after software limit stops
I/O Control $1021 - Admission valve position setpoint after software limit stops
I/O Control $1062 - Fuel pressure pump final PWM
I/O Control $107F - State of the fuel pump relay control
I/O Control $1093 - Charge air cooler water pump driving duty ratio applied
I/O Control $1098 - PTC anti-icing output state final command
I/O Control $109F - Coolant tank valve opening command
I/O Control $10D3 - Electrical engine coolant pump speed target
I/O Control $201A - Final Pwm for intake VTC solenoid command (first component of corresponding vector)
I/O Control $201B - Final Pwm for exhaust VTC solenoid command (first component of corresponding vector)
I/O Control $202F - Purge Pump Target Rotation
I/O Control $2036 - Drain cut valve command
I/O Control $2004 - Inlet throttle position setpoint after software limit stops

Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est déprotégé et n'interdit pas le démarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car il ne reçoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car la BCM ne répond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifié la clé ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monté sur le véhicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protégé car la BCM n'envoie pas la clé secrète: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisée à envoyer la clé secrète
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotégé" et n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a détécté une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)
